SEARCH
Package com.stevenlagoy.presidency.data

Interface Repr<T extends Repr<T>>

Type Parameters:
T - The type of the object implementing this interface (should be the same as the Class Name).
All Known Implementing Classes:
Airport, Bloc, Candidate, Character, CharacterManager, CharacterModel, CongressionalDistrict, County, Demographics, DemographicsManager, Engine, EventManager, FederalOfficial, GraphicsManager, LanguageManager, LocalOfficial, Manager, MapManager, Municipality, Name, NameManager, Nation, Personality, Player, PoliticalActor, Railway, Roadway, Seaport, Skills, State, StateOfficial, TimeManager
public interface Repr<T extends Repr<T>>
Interface allowing Repr methods to be used to create or store Repr Strings representing instances of classes which implement this interface.

Example Usage:

class MyClass implements Repr<MyClass> { ... }

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <T> String
    arrayToReprList(Collection<T> list)
    Turns a Collection of Objects into a Repr-format list containing those Objects.
    static <T> String
    arrayToReprList(T[] array)
    Turns an array of Objects into a Repr-format list containing those Objects.
    static <O> String
    classRepr(Class<O> clazz)
    Takes any object and returns a skeleton/blank Repr-format String representation of an instance of that object's class.
    T
    fromRepr(String repr)
    Interpret an Object from a valid Repr String.
    String
    toRepr()
    Create a Repr String representation of this object.

  • Method Details

    • toRepr

      String toRepr()
      Create a Repr String representation of this object.
      Returns:
      A String in valid Repr format representing the object.

    • fromRepr

      T fromRepr(String repr)
      Interpret an Object from a valid Repr String.
      Parameters:
      repr - A Repr-formatted String to parse.
      Returns:
      The created object if interpreted properly from the Repr String, null otherwise.

    • classRepr

      static <O> String classRepr(Class<O> clazz)
      Takes any object and returns a skeleton/blank Repr-format String representation of an instance of that object's class. For a filled version, use the object's toRepr() method.
      Type Parameters:
      O - Object
      Parameters:
      clazz - Any class
      Returns:
      Skeleton (unfilled) Repr-format String representation of an object of the class.

    • arrayToReprList

      static <T> String arrayToReprList(T[] array)
      Turns an array of Objects into a Repr-format list containing those Objects. Uses the Objects' toString() method.
      Type Parameters:
      T - Object
      Parameters:
      array - An array of Objects.
      Returns:
      A Repr-format String containing a List of all the Objects' String (or Repr, when available) forms.

    • arrayToReprList

      static <T> String arrayToReprList(Collection<T> list)
      Turns a Collection of Objects into a Repr-format list containing those Objects. Uses the Objects' toString() method.
      Type Parameters:
      T - Object
      Parameters:
      list - A Collection of Objects.
      Returns:
      A Repr-format String containing a List of all the Objects' String (or Repr, when available) forms.
